title: Africa Alternative Lending Databook Report 2026: Market to Reach $8.1 Billion by 2029 from $4.8 Billion in 2025 - Size & Forecast by Value and Volume Across 100+ KPIs 2020-2029
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: Africa's alternative lending market is projected to grow from $4.8 billion in 2025 to $8.1 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 13.9%. Growth is driven by digital credit expansion, mobile money integration, and regulatory formalization across key markets like Nigeria, Kenya, and Ghana. However, tightening regulations are raising barriers to entry and shifting competitive dynamics toward licensed platforms and partnerships.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Announced acquisition of majority stake in Kenya's NCBA, demonstrating bank re-entry into digital lending markets with strategic expansion.
